audience_policies.source_phrase: This pass allows four (4) people at the Harvard Museum of Natural History or the Peabody admission desks at 50% off regular museum admission rates . Includes access to all four (4) HMSC museums.

coupon.source_phrase_block: This pass allows four (4) people at the Harvard Museum of Natural History or the Peabody admission desks at 50% off regular museum admission rates . Includes access to all four (4) HMSC museums.
